info.title: FortiManager JSON API Documentation
info.description:
Documentation for FortiManager JSON API

The Security Console daemon is responsible for global package assignment and configuration installation. All APIs for this daemon are under the prefix /securityconsole/.

tags.name: /securityconsole/abort
tags.description: Abort and cancel a security console task.

tags.name: /securityconsole/assign/package
tags.description: Assign or unassign global policy package to ADOM packages.

tags.name: /securityconsole/import/dev/objs
tags.description: Import objects from device to ADOM, or from ADOM to Global.

tags.name: /securityconsole/install/package
tags.description: Copy and install a policy package to devices.

tags.name: /securityconsole/install/preview
tags.description: Generate install preview for a device.

tags.name: /securityconsole/package/cancel/install
tags.description: Cancel policy install and clear preview cache. Only to be used when a preview cache is previously generated by install/package command.

tags.name: /securityconsole/package/clone
tags.description: Clone a policy package within the same ADOM.

tags.name: /securityconsole/package/commit
tags.description: Install policies to device from preview cache. Only to be used when a preview cache is previously generated by install/package command.

tags.name: /securityconsole/package/move
tags.description: Move and/or rename a policy package within the same ADOM.

tags.name: /securityconsole/preview/result
tags.description: Retrieve the result of previous install/preview command.

tags.name: /securityconsole/reinstall/package
tags.description: Re-install a policy package that had been previously installed.

tags.name: /securityconsole/sign/certificate/template
tags.description: Generate and sign certificate on the target device.

message.description: Commands to be installed, or error message if install preview failed.

flags.description:
cp_all_objs - Assign all objects during global policy assignment.
copy_assigned_pkg - For global policy assignment - copy assigned package from ADOM to device.
unassign - Remove global policy from ADOM.

excluded.description:
disable - Only include the packages listed in the pkg list.
enable - Exclude the package listed in the pkg list, and assign to all other packages in the ADOM.

pkg.description: Destination ADOM policy package path and name.

add_mappings.description:
Automatically add required dynamic mappings for the device during the search stages.
When used in policy_search action, add dynamic interface and zone mappings; in obj_search action, add ADOM object mappings.
This attribute is not available for the do action.

dst_name.description: Name of the policy package where the objects are to be imported. If the package does not already exist in the database, a new one will be created.

dst_parent.description: Path to the folder for the target package. If the package is to be placed in root, leave this field blank.

import_action.description:
do - Perform the policy and object import.
policy_search - Preprocess and scan through device database to gather information about policies that need to be imported. Can automatically add interface and zone mappings if add_mappings is enabled.
obj_search - Preprocess and scan through device database to collect objects that are required to be imported. Can automatically add object mappings if add_mappings is enabled.

flags.description:
preview - Generate preview cache only.
auto_lock_ws - Automatically lock and unlock workspace when performing security console task.

adom_rev_comments.description: If "generate_rev" flag is set, the comment for the new ADOM revision.

adom_rev_name.description: If "generate_rev" flag is set, the name for the new ADOM revision.

dev_rev_comments.description: Comments for the device configuration revision that will be generated during install.

flags.description:
cp_all_objs - Assign all objects during global policy assignment.
preview - Generate preview cache only.
generate_rev - Generate new ADOM revision before install.
copy_assigned_pkg - For global policy assignment - copy assigned package from ADOM to device.
unassign - Remove global policy from ADOM.
ifpolicy_only - Only install interface policies.
no_ifpolicy - Install regular policies only - do not install interface policies.
objs_only - Install object(s) only - do not install any policies.
auto_lock_ws - Automatically lock and unlock workspace when performing security console task.
copy_only - Only copy to device db.

dst_name.description: Name of the new policy package.

dst_parent.description: Path to the folder for the target package. If the package is to be placed in root, leave this field blank.

dst_name.description: Name of the new policy package. If omitted from request, original name will be kept or a new name will be generated in case of duplication.

dst_parent.description: Path to the folder for the target package. If the package is to be placed in root, leave this field blank.

flags.description:
cp_all_objs - Assign all objects during global policy assignment.
preview - Generate preview cache only.
generate_rev - Generate new ADOM revision before install.
copy_assigned_pkg - For global policy assignment - copy assigned package from ADOM to device.
unassign - Remove global policy from ADOM.
ifpolicy_only - Only install interface policies.
no_ifpolicy - Install regular policies only - do not install interface policies.
objs_only - Install object(s) only - do not install any policies.
auto_lock_ws - Automatically lock and unlock workspace when performing security console task.
copy_only - Only copy to device db.
